summary: Tested iteration 139 - Subscription toggle, Customer CRM Manager, Logo Upload. All 9 features PASS. Backend API returns correct structure. Frontend components render correctly.

issues: File input for logo is hidden (uses className='hidden') but clickable via Upload Logo button - this is intentional design, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: Customer CRM endpoint correctly aggregates from page_orders collection with status in ['completed', 'paid']
Subscription toggle state stored in formData.is_subscription, frequency in formData.subscription_frequency, trial in formData.trial_period_days
Logo upload uses existing /api/upload/image endpoint - consistent with product image uploads
CustomerCRMManager loads data from /api/page-analytics/{pageId}/customers - returns empty customers array with stats when no orders exist
seed_data_creation: None - Used existing test page mpage_000a72b44296
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 139 tested Subscription/Recurring toggle, Customer CRM Manager, and Logo Upload features. All working. Test page mpage_000a72b44296 has no completed orders so Customer CRM shows empty state. To test customer cards with Send Offer/Request Review buttons, need to create a completed order with customer info first.

subscription_toggle.ui_text: Recurring / Subscription - Enable for recurring billing

subscription_frequency_dropdown.location: Add/Edit Product Modal (visible after toggle enabled)

trial_period_input.location: Add/Edit Product Modal (visible after toggle enabled)
trial_period_input.description: Trial Period (days) - Set to 0 for no trial period. 8% platform fee applies to each charge.

customers_tab_with_heart.position: After Delivery, before Team in tab list

customer_crm_search_filter.search_placeholder: Search by name, email, or phone...

send_offer_request_review_buttons.current_state: Empty state shown - 'No Customers Yet' because no completed orders exist
send_offer_request_review_buttons.button_text: Send Offer (with Gift icon), Request Review (with Star icon)

logo_upload_settings.description: Upload a logo or business icon. It will be displayed on your public page.
logo_upload_settings.camera_icon: Camera icon displayed in logo placeholder

response_structure.customers: array - empty when no completed orders

api_customers_endpoint.authentication: Required - returns 401 without token, 403 if not page owner
